name: for_oembed
description: oEmbed plugin for TinyMCE (FriendsOfREDAXO) — CKEditor-5-compatible <oembed> output, YouTube & Vimeo preview

scripts.build-copy: mkdir -p ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_oembed/ ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/for_oembed/ && mkdir -p ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_oembed/ ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/for_oembed/

author: FriendsOfREDAXO
